title: Unbreakable Mace
description: Don't lose your Mace due to it breaking!
body:
**⚠️ This data pack requires the server-side mod [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components) ⚠️**

# ⚒️ Unbreakable Mace
- **Maces no longer lose durability**, allowing them to be used infinitely
- **Compatible with vanilla clients**, without any disparity
